untranslatable_reason: The signal describes a perceptron machine learning model with dynamically optimized linear weights combining multiple unknown component trading rules. The specific component rules, weight optimization algorithm, lookback period, threshold values, and parameter tuning methodology are all marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Without knowledge of the underlying component rules and their optimization mechanism, this cannot be translated into deterministic indicator-based conditions. A perceptron's learned weights and decision boundary are black-box outputs that cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators.
translation_notes: This signal requires a trained machine learning model (perceptron) that is not reproducible from standard technical indicators alone. The daily re-optimization and moving-window parameter updates represent adaptive behavior that fundamentally differs from rule-based backtesting. To implement this, one would need: (1) the specific component trading rules being weighted, (2) the optimization methodology and parameters, (3) the trained weight coefficients, and (4) the decision threshold. None of these are provided or derivable from the source text.
